leadText: The Chalky Stone (Japanese: チョークいし Chalkstone) is a valuable item introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Chalky Stone serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A small whitish stone picked up at the edge of the road.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description GO A small, whitish stone picked up at the edge of the road. Your buddy thought you'd like it!
